auth.signInDescBoth: Sign in with your Microsoft account or your email and password
auth.signInDescMicrosoft: Sign in with your company Microsoft account to continue
auth.signInDescLocal: Sign in with your email and password to continue
auth.itPolicy: By signing in you agree to the company IT policy.
auth.registerDesc: Register with your email address to join the intranet
auth.name: Name

dashboard.noAnnouncementsHint: Editors and admins can post company news from the Strapi admin panel.

people.title: People
people.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, title, or email…
people.emptyHint: Users will appear here once they sign in.

events.title: Events
events.description: Company events, town halls, and meetings.
events.emptyHint: Admins and editors can create events from the Strapi admin panel.

wiki.title: Wiki
wiki.description: Knowledge base, handbooks and how-tos organised in spaces.
wiki.emptySpacesHint: Create a space in the Strapi admin to start collecting knowledge.
wiki.emptyPagesTitle: No pages yet in this space
wiki.emptyPagesHint: Pages created in the Strapi admin will appear here once published.

departments.title: Departments
departments.head: Head
departments.emptyHint: Create your first department in the Strapi admin and it will show up here.

teams.title: Teams
teams.emptyHint: Teams belong to departments — add them in the Strapi admin.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.description: The latest news, operational updates and memos from across the company. Pinned posts stay at the top until they're unpinned by an editor.
announcements.emptyHint: Editors and admins can post company news from the Strapi admin panel. New posts will appear here and in the dashboard feed.

kudos.title: Kudos
kudos.description: Recognize your colleagues for great work.
kudos.messagePlaceholder: What did they do that was great?
kudos.emptyHint: Be the first to recognize a colleague — click the button above!

polls.title: Polls
polls.description: Vote on company polls and see results.
polls.emptyHint: Admins and editors can create polls from the Strapi admin panel.

documents.title: Documents
documents.description: Company policies, forms, templates, and guides.
documents.emptyHint: Admins and editors can upload documents from the Strapi admin panel.

profile.title: My profile
profile.description: Manage how you appear to colleagues across the intranet.
profile.profileDetailsDesc: Your display name and contact details, shown on the people directory.
profile.passwordDescLocal: Change the password you use to sign in.
profile.passwordManagedByMicrosoft: Your password is managed by your Microsoft account.

admin.title: Admin
admin.description: Content, users and roles are managed in the Strapi admin panel. This page surfaces the most common entry points so you don't have to remember them.
admin.analyticsDesc: Content counts, engagement metrics, and recent activity.
admin.rolesDesc: Sinnlos ships with six roles. New Microsoft Entra ID users are assigned via group claims and the mapping in {file}.
admin.roleChangeHint: Need to change how Microsoft groups map to roles?
admin.contentManagerDesc: Edit wiki pages, departments, teams and announcements.
admin.rolesPermissionsDesc: Configure what each role can read or write.
admin.usersDesc: Review users synced from Microsoft Entra ID.
admin.roleAdmin: Full CRUD on everything. Manages users, roles and departments.
admin.roleEditor: CRUD on wiki pages and announcements. Read access to users.
admin.roleDeptManager: Manages their own department, its teams and scoped wiki pages.
admin.roleTeamLead: CRUD on their own team pages, read elsewhere.
admin.roleMember: Read everything their role/department/team permits. Edits their profile.
admin.roleGuest: Read-only access to public wiki spaces.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Content and engagement overview across the intranet.

errors.cmsUnreachable: The CMS is unreachable or returned an error. Content below may be incomplete — refresh once Strapi is back up.
